inputs.label: Foot-Pounds (ft·lb)
inputs.businessContext: The energy or torque value in foot-pounds to convert.

businessContext_i18n.en: The energy or torque value in foot-pounds to convert.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüştürülecek foot-pound cinsinden enerji veya tork değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Energie- oder Drehmomentwert in Foot-Pound, der umgerechnet werden soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur d'énergie ou de couple en pieds-livres à convertir.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor de energía o torque en libras-pie a convertir.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor (J/ft·lb)
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion factor. Modify only if using a different calibration.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard conversion factor. Modify only if using a different calibration.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart dönüşüm faktörü. Yalnızca farklı bir kalibrasyon kullanıyorsanız değiştirin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Umrechnungsfaktor. Nur bei abweichender Kalibrierung ändern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de conversion standard. Modifiez-le uniquement si vous utilisez un étalonnage différent.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de conversión estándar. Modificar solo si se usa una calibración diferente.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the output value.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the output value.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıktı değeri için ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für den Ausgabewert.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour la valeur de sortie.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para el valor de salida.

inputs.label: Measurement Uncertainty (%)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated measurement uncertainty as a percentage of the converted value.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated measurement uncertainty as a percentage of the converted value.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüştürülen değerin yüzdesi olarak tahmini ölçüm belirsizliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzte Messunsicherheit als Prozentsatz des umgerechneten Werts.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Incertitude de mesure estimée en pourcentage de la valeur convertie.
businessContext_i18n.es: Incertidumbre de medición estimada como porcentaje del valor convertido.

breakdown: 'Rounded to ' + decimal_places + ' decimal places: ' + joules_rounded + ' J'
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
